---
title: Brand 6
engine: jupyter
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      burnished-copper: "#b87333"
      aged-bronze: "#8c7853"
      tarnished-brass: "#a67c52"
      antique-gold: "#c9a84c"
      warm-pewter: "#8a8174"
    background:
      dark: "#1a1610"
      light: "#faf8f3"
    foreground:
      dark: "#c4b090"
      light: "#5a4a30"
    dark:
      dark: "#1a1610"
      light: "#5a4a30"
    light:
      dark: "#c4b090"
      light: "#faf8f3"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Crimson Text
        source: file
        files:
          - path: ../../fonts/crimson-text.ttf
      - family: Abril Fatface
        source: file
        files:
          - path: ../../fonts/abril-fatface.ttf
      - family: Courier Prime
        source: file
        files:
          - path: ../../fonts/courier-prime.ttf
    base: Crimson Text
    headings: Abril Fatface
    monospace: Courier Prime
---

{{< include /brands/_python.qmd >}}
